name: bot-014-script-builder
description: Turn any short message — an announcement, product update, quote, stat, or headline (pasted text OR a URL) — into a faithful, structured MessageDoc for an animated-text video. Use this FIRST whenever the user gives text or a link and wants it presented as a Kinetic Text video. Extracts the headline, dek, key facts, a quote, a stat, the dateline and source, picks 1-3 highlight phrases, and recommends a style + mood — writing 01-newsdoc.md (human) and newsdoc.json (the render contract). It NEVER fabricates facts — every field traces to the input or is null.

inputs.name: message-text
inputs.description: Pasted text of the message — a headline and/or body. One of text/url is required.

inputs.name: source-url
inputs.description: A URL to the message/article; fetched + readability-extracted. One of text/url is required.

inputs.name: highlight-hints
inputs.description: Optional phrases the user wants emphasized; otherwise the skill picks 1-3.

outputs.name: newsdoc-human
outputs.description: Human-readable structured story for the user to review before rendering.

outputs.name: newsdoc-machine
outputs.description: The NewsDoc — the read-only contract consumed by bot-014-text-animator.

outputs.name: raw-input
outputs.description: The verbatim pasted text or fetched extract + URL, saved unchanged.
